title: Tray icons unconditionally written to disk every startup (regression)
evidence: g_file_set_contents(icon_bw.c_str(), …); g_file_set_contents(icon_ac.c_str(), …); — called unconditionally in write_icons(), no g_file_test check. Previously fixed in commit cd82035 but reverted in 4d8f579 when icons were rewritten.
suggestion: Check if icon files exist and have correct size before writing, or write a stamp file. Avoids unnecessary disk writes on every startup.

notes.text: Added g_file_test(G_FILE_TEST_EXISTS) guards before each g_file_set_contents call in write_icons(). Skips write if icon already on disk.
